title: Degree Symbol: Copy & Paste ° Temperature & Angle Signs
meta_description: Copy and paste the degree symbol (°) plus Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, angle, and prime signs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The degree sign (°) and every temperature, angle, and prime symbol that goes with it. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The degree symbol marks temperature, angles, and coordinates. This library gathers the degree sign alongside the Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin marks, angle and geometry signs, and the prime characters used for minutes and seconds.
